case_title: HOLLOWAY, JAMES ROMEO JR. VS RYAN'S EXPRESS MOVING & STORAGE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HOLLOWAY, JAMES ROMEO JR. AS TO DEFENDANT RYAN'S EXPRESS MOVING & STORAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-2000 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RYAN'S EXPRESS MOVING & STORAGE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-25-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-06-2000 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE SETTLEMENT, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 11/6/00 AT 6:30 PM & THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE
NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE FOR TRIAL SENT TO RYAN'S EXPRESS MOVING & STORAGE RETURNED UNDELIVERED. FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLLOWAY, JAMES ROMEO JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RYAN'S EXPRESS MOVING & STORAGE $3,617.53 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,617.53 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
'NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT' RETURNED UNCLAIMED: "RETURNED TO SENDER/FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED".
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY RON JACKSON HEARING SET FOR SEP-06-2001 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY SMITH, TOM HEARING SET FOR SEP-27-2001 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF SEP-06-2001, OFF CALENDAR AS TO THIRD PARTY RON JACKSON
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF SEP-27-2001, OFF CALENDAR AS TO THIRD PARTY SMITH, TOM
OEX O/C; NO POS FILED, NO APPEARANCES.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $563.71 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT RYAN'S EXPRESS MOVING & STORAGE
